legacy.content:
# Phase 34-01 Summary: Feature-first runtime model completion
## Completed
1. Added `featureSchema` to `space-vectors` contract and default pack content. 2. Added feature-schema runtime helpers (`getFeatureSchema`, `getSpaceFeatureIds`). 3. Updated Space Explorer to switch runtime spaces (`content`, `action`, `event`, `effect`). 4. Added local policy selection for non-MCP browser playthrough generation. 5. Updated engine/docs wording toward feature-first model.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed.
